titleStmt.title: SII 34.99: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 99. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 5th year = A.D. 1017.

Ending part damaged. The inscription records a gift of land made in the 21st year of Rājarāja I by the ūrār of Tiruveṟumbiyūr in Vaḍa-kavira-nāḍu a unit of Paṇḍikulāsani-vaḷanāḍu on the south bank, for offerings to the temple of Tirumalai-Āḻvār. Interestingly the cardinal dimensions of the land measuring 8 mā and odd are given as 24, 35, 26.5 and 35 rods respectively starting from the east side. The measuring rod was called māḷigaik-kōl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī
tirumaṉivaḷara
Irunila maṭantaiyu
m pōrcceyap pā
vaiyum cīrtta
ṉiccelviyum
taṉ perun
tēviyarāki I
ṉpuṟa neṭutu
yal Ūḻiyuḷ
Iṭaituṟai nāṭum cu
ṭarvaṉa vēli paṭarva
ṉa vāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭ koḷ
ḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkaru muraṇ
maṇṇaikkaṭakkamu māp porutaṇṭā
ṟ koṇṭa kōppara kēcari panmarāṉa śrī
rājēntra cōḷa devaṟku yāṇṭu
5 Āvatu teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulā
caṉi vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavira nāṭṭu tiru
veṟumpiyūr Ūrōm tiruveṟum
piyūr tirumalai Āḻvārkku śrīrājarāja
devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu nāṅ
kaḷ śandrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyili nivanta
m ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu
Eṅkaḷūr te
ṉṉūr Eṅkaḷ Ēri
karaikku mēkku te
ṉ pāṟ kellai śrī
cōḻa mātevica
turvveti maṅkala
t tellai
ka
mīy pāṟkel
lai Aññūṟṟuva
vayakkalukku
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai rājādit
taṉ cāttaṉ nilattu
kku teṟku Iṉṉum Ay
yaṉ kōyilukku teṟku māḷi
kaikkōlāl Oru kōl nīk
ki Āka Innilattukku kīḻ
kai māḷikai kōlāl I
rupattu nālum teṉkai
muppattaiṅ kōlum mīkai Irupattāṟaraiyum vaṭa
kai muppattaiñcum 1/4 1 mā 1 kāṇi Āka kai
vanta vāṟṟāl nilam 1/4 1 mā 1 kāṇi kki
1/4 3 mā Innilam Eṭṭumā mukkāṇi
kkīḻ Eḻumāvaraiyum Uṇṇi
lam Oḻivinṟi mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nica
tapaṭi ciṟukālai sandhiyil paruppu pōṉa
kam Amutu ce
yya pōnakapa
ḻavarici munnā
ḻiyāl nellu Eḻunāḻiyuriyum tūpparuppu nā
ceytukuṭuttōm tiruveṟumpiyūr tirumalai
Āḻvārkku tiruveṟumpiyūr Ūrōm Innilattukku
vanta Iṟaiyum Eccōṟum vācali
Digital edition of SII 34.99 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
